tools.name: x402_health
tools.description: Free liveness + pricing for the money-engine Research API (x402 USDC on Base). Ladder: free sample_outline → outline 0.01 → brief 0.02.

tools.name: x402_discovery
tools.description: Free x402 discovery document (resources, prices, payTo, facilitator, convertLadder).

tools.name: x402_sample_outline
tools.description: FREE research teaser (3 bullets). Convert ladder: this tool → paid x402_research_outline 0.01 USDC → x402_research_brief 0.02 USDC Base. Body {topic?} default x402.

tools.name: x402_sample_scrub
tools.description: Free sample data-scrub / leak-guard teaser (dirty→clean demo). Alt path — primary convert is x402_sample_outline → outline 0.01.

tools.name: x402_research_outline
tools.description: Paid research outline (0.01 USDC Base · first pay). Free first: x402_sample_outline. Body {topic}. Without paymentHeader returns 402 + accepts[].

tools.name: x402_research_brief
tools.description: Paid full research brief (0.02 USDC Base · upgrade). Free first: x402_sample_outline; optional outline 0.01 first. Body {topic}. Without paymentHeader returns 402 + accepts[].
